channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kisumu Senate Race Heats Up with Nyandiare Leading Polls
item.description: A new opinion poll by Swiss Poll International has highlighted the competitive race for the Kisumu Senate seat, with Stephen Ochieng Nyandiare emerging as the frontrunner with 27.3% support. Samuel Od...

item.title: Ombudsman Remulla's Investigation into 2019 SEA Games Sports Facilities
item.description: The Ombudsman's office is reopening its investigation into alleged irregularities in the construction of sports facilities for the 2019 Southeast Asian Games, emphasizing reliance on factual evidence....

item.title: Egyptian President El Sisi's Arrival in Tanzania Celebrated
item.description: The article highlights the arrival of Egyptian President Abdel Fattah El Sisi in Tanzania on July 18, 2026, where he was warmly welcomed by local authorities and citizens. The event underscores the st...

item.title: Missing Mother and Infant in Northern B.C. Seek Public's Help
item.description: A 31-year-old mother, Nicole Andrus, and her one-month-old son, Krew Gordon, have been missing since July 9 in northern British Columbia. RCMP in Fort St. John are appealing to the public for assistan...

item.title: Florida's GOP Primary Intensifies as DeSantis Refuses to Back Contenders
item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis' refusal to support any clear frontrunner in the state's gubernatorial race has turned the contest into a contentious GOP primary marked by race-baiting and in-fighting. ...

item.title: Ebola outbreak in DRC continues with 2,124 cases and 828 deaths
item.description: The Bundibugyo virus disease (BVD) outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) remains active, with sustained transmission driving increases in reported cases and deaths. As of 15 July 2026...

item.title: Vertu Alphafold's AI-driven luxury smartphone faces execution challenges
item.description: The article reviews Vertu's Alphafold, a premium smartphone aimed at affluent professionals, which integrates Hermes Agent—an AI platform designed to assist executives with tasks like legal advice and...

item.title: Moses Kuria Assures Continued Development Projects in Ol Kalou Despite UDA Loss
item.description: Moses Kuria, former president William Ruto's senior economic advisor, has congratulated Ol Kalou MP-elect Kamau Ngotho following his by-election victory. In a statement shared on July 18, 2026, Kuria ...

item.title: Mbamba Bay Port Launches Economic Opportunities for Southern Africa
item.description: The opening of the New Mbamba Bay Port marks a significant milestone for Southern Africa's economic development. Located in Tanzania, this state-of-the-art facility is designed to enhance regional tra...

item.title: China's Moonshot AI Model Challenges Global Tech Giants, Sparking Market Volatility
item.description: Chinese startup Moonshot AI has unveiled its Kimi K3 AI model, which has stunned the tech world by matching the performance of top-tier AI systems from OpenAI and Anthropic. This breakthrough has sent...

item.title: Sugar-Coated Nanoparticles Target Brain Tumors in Experimental Therapy
item.description: Researchers at Oregon State University have developed an experimental treatment for glioblastoma, the most aggressive form of brain cancer, using sugar-coated nanoparticles to deliver genetic material...

item.title: Eastern Ontario health officials alert to surge in tick-borne diseases
item.description: The medical officer of health for Eastern Ontario has issued a warning about the increasing prevalence of tick-borne illnesses in the region. This comes as public health officials monitor rising cases...

item.title: Scaloni Honors Messi Ahead of World Cup Final Clash with Spain
item.description: Argentina's head coach Lionel Scaloni paid emotional tribute to Lionel Messi, calling him 'pure history' and 'a legend' as the team prepares for the 2026 FIFA World Cup final against Spain. Speaking a...

item.title: Jennifer Lopez performs at Dolce & Gabbana's Alta Moda show in Italy in striking lingerie and one-piece attire
item.description: Jennifer Lopez, the iconic singer and actress, made a striking fashion statement during her performance at Dolce & Gabbana's Alta Moda show in Italy. The 56-year-old star captivated audiences by first...

item.title: BCCI Secretary Reaffirms Rohit Sharma's ODI Future Amid Retirement Speculation
item.description: India's cricket board (BCCI) secretary Devajit Saikia has dismissed rumors suggesting that Sunday's one-day international against England at Lord’s will be opener Rohit Sharma's last match. The 39-yea...

item.title: Security Forces Successfully Neutralize Terror Threat in Wana
item.description: Security forces in Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province successfully foiled a major terrorist attempt in Wana, South Waziristan district, through an intelligence-based operation. A vehicle carrying ...

item.title: google's inaction allows toxic ads to ruin android app ecosystem
item.description: The article critiques the current state of Android's free app ecosystem, blaming Google for failing to address intrusive and user-hostile advertising practices. It highlights how modern ads have evolv...

item.title: Erwan Heussaff Discusses Past Controversies Involving Butter Carbonara and Uncooked Sago
item.description: Erwan Heussaff, a prominent Filipino celebrity known for his work with PUSH Team and his presence in media platforms like Tastemade, recently reflected on past controversies that sparked public debate...

item.title: NBA Election Delayed Due to Cyberattack
item.description: The Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) 2026 national election has started after a delay caused by a cyberattack on its voting platform. The election, initially scheduled for midnight Saturday, faced disru...

item.title: Policy Decisions for Economic Development and Expansion
item.description: The article discusses the government's ongoing efforts to implement policy decisions aimed at fostering economic development and expansion. It highlights the importance of strategic planning and regul...
